To filter the frog species names by length, we define a function that iterates through the provided list and checks each name's character count. entry  
The function compares the length of every species name against the specified minimum threshold. entry  
Only those names exceeding the minimum length are collected into a new result list. entry  
This approach ensures the output contains precisely the species that meet the criteria. entry  
Here is the complete Python implementation for the task. entry  

```python
def filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length):
    return [name for name in species_list if len(name) > min_length]
```
